message:
fix(latency,macaroon,raptorq): 7 audit bugs across 3 files

latency_algebra.rs (4 bugs):
- MEDIUM: from_segments now rejects NaN values in rate/burst/start
- MEDIUM: build_curve_from_points simplification verifies collinearity
  before merging segments, preventing discontinuity gaps
- LOW: staircase() clamps epsilon to MIN_POSITIVE to prevent subnormal
  underflow when period is very small
- Note: negative-rate clamping in build_curve_from_points left as-is
  since it's defensive against numerical imprecision in sampling

macaroon.rs (2 bugs):
- MEDIUM: verify_with_discharges now checks third-party caveats on
  discharge macaroons recursively, per Macaroon spec (Birgisson 2014)
- LOW: xor_pad uses assert_eq instead of debug_assert_eq for length
  check, preventing silent truncation in release builds

raptorq/decoder.rs (1 bug):
- MEDIUM: select_hard_regime_plan now called AFTER rebuild_dense_matrix
  so density metrics reflect the original matrix, not the partially-
  eliminated one (two call sites fixed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
